message:
Update CLI tests for new JSON output formats

Updates tests to align with the new wrapped JSON response formats:
- list command: outputs { prompts: [...], count: N }
- search command: outputs { results: [...], query, authenticated }

Test file changes:
- auth.test.ts: Fix async handling for logout/whoami tests
- collections.test.ts: Update to use new list response format
- login.test.ts: Handle JSON output in non-TTY environments
- save.test.ts: Fix mock reset between tests
- e2e/auth-flow.test.ts: Update expected JSON structures
- e2e/discovery-flow.test.ts: Update list/search assertions
- e2e/network-failures.test.ts: Update expected output formats

All 248 unit tests pass. E2E tests need further updates for full compatibility.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
